title: Caxias do Sul、RS — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Caxias do Sul、RSの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Caxias do SulはRSにある人口523,716の都市です。The heart of Brazil’s wine country in Serra Gaúcha, famous for its Italian heritage, vineyards, and the Festa da Uva grape festival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
